<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d"></a>

# AnimationNodeBlendSpace2D

**Inherits:** [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode) **<** [AnimationNode](class_animationnode.md#class-animationnode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A set of [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s placed on 2D coordinates, crossfading between the three adjacent ones. Used by [AnimationTree](class_animationtree.md#class-animationtree).

## Description

A resource used by [AnimationNodeBlendTree](class_animationnodeblendtree.md#class-animationnodeblendtree).

**AnimationNodeBlendSpace2D** represents a virtual 2D space on which [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s are placed. Outputs the linear blend of the three adjacent animations using a [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) weight. Adjacent in this context means the three [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s making up the triangle that contains the current value.

You can add vertices to the blend space with [add_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point) and automatically triangulate it by setting [auto_triangles](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-auto-triangles) to `true`. Otherwise, use [add_triangle()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-triangle) and [remove_triangle()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-triangle) to triangulate the blend space by hand.

## Tutorials

- [Using AnimationTree](../tutorials/animation/animation_tree.md)
- [Third Person Shooter (TPS) Demo](https://godotengine.org/asset-library/asset/2710)

## Signals

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-signal-triangles-updated"></a>

**triangles_updated**() [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-signal-triangles-updated)

Emitted every time the blend space's triangles are created, removed, or when one of their vertices changes position.

---

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode"></a>

enum **BlendMode**: [🔗](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode)

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-constant-blend-mode-interpolated"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_INTERPOLATED** = `0`

The interpolation between animations is linear.

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-constant-blend-mode-discrete"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE** = `1`

The blend space plays the animation of the animation node which blending position is closest to. Useful for frame-by-frame 2D animations.

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-constant-blend-mode-discrete-carry"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE_CARRY** = `2`

Similar to [BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-constant-blend-mode-discrete), but starts the new animation at the last animation's playback position.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-auto-triangles"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **auto_triangles** = `true` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-auto-triangles)

-  **set_auto_triangles**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_auto_triangles**()

If `true`, the blend space is triangulated automatically. The mesh updates every time you add or remove points with [add_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point) and [remove_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-blend-point).

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-blend-mode"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode) **blend_mode** = `0` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-blend-mode)

-  **set_blend_mode**(value: [BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode))
- [BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace2d-blendmode) **get_blend_mode**()

Controls the interpolation between animations.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-max-space"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **max_space** = `Vector2(1, 1)` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-max-space)

-  **set_max_space**(value: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2))
- [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_max_space**()

The blend space's X and Y axes' upper limit for the points' position. See [add_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point).

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-min-space"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **min_space** = `Vector2(-1, -1)` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-min-space)

-  **set_min_space**(value: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2))
- [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_min_space**()

The blend space's X and Y axes' lower limit for the points' position. See [add_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point).

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-snap"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **snap** = `Vector2(0.1, 0.1)` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-snap)

-  **set_snap**(value: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2))
- [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_snap**()

Position increment to snap to when moving a point.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-sync"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **sync** = `false` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-sync)

-  **set_use_sync**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_using_sync**()

If `false`, the blended animations' frame are stopped when the blend value is `0`.

If `true`, forcing the blended animations to advance frame.

---

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **x_label** = `"x"` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-property-x-label)

-  **set_x_label**(value: [String](class_string.md#class-string))

Name of the blend space's X axis.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point"></a>

 **add_blend_point**(node: [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode), pos: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2), at_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-blend-point)

Adds a new point that represents a `node` at the position set by `pos`. You can insert it at a specific index using the `at_index` argument. If you use the default value for `at_index`, the point is inserted at the end of the blend points array.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-triangle"></a>

 **add_triangle**(x: [int](class_int.md#class-int), y: [int](class_int.md#class-int), z: [int](class_int.md#class-int), at_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-add-triangle)

Creates a new triangle using three points `x`, `y`, and `z`. Triangles can overlap. You can insert the triangle at a specific index using the `at_index` argument. If you use the default value for `at_index`, the point is inserted at the end of the blend points array.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_blend_point_count**()  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-count)

Returns the number of points in the blend space.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-node"></a>

[AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode) **get_blend_point_node**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-node)

Returns the [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode) referenced by the point at index `point`.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-position"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_blend_point_position**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-blend-point-position)

Returns the position of the point at index `point`.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-triangle-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_triangle_count**()  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-triangle-count)

Returns the number of triangles in the blend space.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-triangle-point"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_triangle_point**(triangle: [int](class_int.md#class-int), point: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-get-triangle-point)

Returns the position of the point at index `point` in the triangle of index `triangle`.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-blend-point"></a>

 **remove_blend_point**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-blend-point)

Removes the point at index `point` from the blend space.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-triangle"></a>

 **remove_triangle**(triangle: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-remove-triangle)

Removes the triangle at index `triangle` from the blend space.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-set-blend-point-node"></a>

 **set_blend_point_node**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int), node: [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-set-blend-point-node)

Changes the [AnimationNode](class_animationnode.md#class-animationnode) referenced by the point at index `point`.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-set-blend-point-position"></a>

 **set_blend_point_position**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int), pos: [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace2d-method-set-blend-point-position)

Updates the position of the point at index `point` in the blend space.
